title: Home lifecycle visibility
description: Home shows launch-critical inbox items and supports read, resolve, dismiss, snooze, and expiry transitions.
userPrompt: Open Home after new job, document, and recommendation events arrive, then move items through their lifecycle actions.
expectedDynamics: Home surfaces job_output_ready, job_blocked, document edit, recommendation, and news items without cross-module failures hiding the rest of the page.

checks.description: Home inbox contains the MVP critical event types.
Read, resolve, dismiss, and snooze transitions are represented.
Expired items are hidden and one failing module does not suppress other Home modules.
